list.title: Agents
list.description: Browse the twins roaming the island — yours and the community's. Open one to dispatch it.

empty.filteredDescription: Try a broader search or clear the filters to see everyone on the island.

detail.title: Agent
detail.tuneDescription: Edit the structured persona directly — changes apply on save.
detail.brainHint: Shaped by the questionnaire or generator — tune it anytime.

detail.evolutionHint: Your twin proposes refinements after each scene — review them to keep it growing.
detail.noEvolutions: No evolutions yet. Dispatch your twin and it'll start proposing improvements.
detail.notFoundDescription: It may have been removed, or the link is off. Head back to the gallery.
